  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AuthController
    Handles login and registration requests.
    AuthService
    Provides the business logic for user registration.
    CustomUserDetailsService
    Retrieves user details from the database for Spring Security.
    MilestoneApplication
    Spring Boot entry point for application.
    Product
    Model representing a product that is stored in the database.
    ProductController
    Processes product page requests.
    ProductRepository
    Provides the access methods for database of Product objects.
    ProductService
    Provides business logic for product-related operations.
    SecurityConfig
    Configures the Spring Security.
    User
    Model representing a user object stored in the database.
    UserRepository
    Provides access methods for User objects in the database.
